_note: HONEST June-2024 reconstruction. Names chosen from what a thematic investor could defensibly pick in mid-2024 WITHOUT knowing 2024-2026 outcomes. Deliberately includes consensus picks that later lagged (AMD, LMT, NOC) and keeps speculative names (RKLB) at the small weight the framework prescribes rather than hindsight-loading the known winners. Replaces the original hindsight book (NVDA/AVGO/PLTR/BWXT/RKLB-heavy).
